raw_title: Do News Media Want to Disentangle from Platforms?
title_en: Do News Media Want to Disentangle from Platforms?
title_zh: 新闻媒体想要与平台脱钩吗？
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨新闻媒体是否希望减少对大型数字平台（如社交媒体和搜索引擎）的依赖，以实现更大的独立性和控制权。
plain_summary_en: This article examines whether news media want to reduce their reliance on large digital platforms (like social media and search engines) to gain more independence and control.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻媒体与平台之间的关系动态，关注媒体自主性和平台依赖问题。
research_direction_en: Investigating the relationship dynamics between news media and platforms in the digital age, focusing on media autonomy and platform dependency.
